nodes.name: Raspberry Robin Malware Targets Telecom, Governments
nodes.description: Raspberry Robin is a multi-stage malware campaign using infected USB-delivered LNK files to launch legitimate Windows utilities that retrieve MSI payloads, followed by heavy obfuscation, fake-payload anti-analysis behavior, persistence, privilege escalation via COM/UAC bypass, and Tor-based communications.

nodes.name: ESXi Hypervisors Malware Persistence via VIBs
nodes.description: ESXi Hypervisors Malware Persistence via VIBs

nodes.name: ScarCruft continues to evolve, introduces Bluetooth harvester
nodes.description: ScarCruft used a multi-stage infection chain involving an initial dropper, UAC bypass, downloader, steganographic payload retrieval, and final deployment of ROKRAT, while also introducing a Bluetooth information harvester and overlapping victimology with DarkHotel and Konni.

nodes.name: behavior_chain observable
nodes.description: initial dropper -> UAC bypass -> installer -> downloader -> steganographic image payload -> ROKRAT
